column7: Increases tiller number and panicle density; apply 1/3 at transplanting, 1/3 at tillering, 1/3 at PI.
Promotes fast establishment after transplanting; reduces transplanting shock through balanced nutrition.
Provides sustained N release with S bonus; reduces ammonia volatilization compared to urea.
Critical for maintaining stem integrity; apply at PI stage for maximum lodging prevention.
Boosts early rooting and stand establishment; triacontanol improves cell division rate in young seedlings after transplanting.
Nano-scale delivery maximizes nutrient uptake per unit applied; algae extract improves early seedling establishment.
Enhances root exudate signaling; promotes beneficial microbial colonization that produces growth-promoting substances.
Dual cropping of Azolla with rice provides continuous N; flooded paddy conditions support Azolla growth alongside crop.
Foliar spray at tillering and PI supports hybrid vigor; water-soluble nutrients boost canopy greenness and photosynthesis.
